name: TDI_Harmless_Bunnies
description:
This adds a chance (about 10%) of any given rabbit spawns being aggressive nasty things.

This adds to the weighted spawns for wildlife_rabbit(s).   Total weighting on vanilla is 100, this adds a 10 for the weak harmless bunnies, 5 for the strong ones, and 2 for the scarey boss rabbits.  So, the odds are out of 117, instead of neat percentages.
Actual direct spawn names for admins, Wildlife_Rabbit_Harmless, Wabbit, and WabbitBoss
changeNote: Added back the completely forgotten Stat modifiers for the wabbits.  Appologies to anyone who fought the 1hp versions and get a shock when fighting the revised editions.
